title: Senate Torture Chamber
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:SenateTortureChamber.jpg|thumb|250px|The [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] Torture Chamber.]]

The '''Senate Torture Chamber''' was a chamber in the [[Republic Executive Building/Legends|Republic Executive Building]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. Captured [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and other enemies of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] were sent here to be questioned and [[Torture/Legends|tortured]]. One such Jedi tortured here was [[Dama Montalvo]], who was tortured by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Appearances==
*[[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']]
